name: Farnesol
description: Farnesol is an odorous molecule included on the list of allergens regulated by Europe. It is present in many essential oils, such as those of linden and acacia flowers. Its name is said to come from a variety of this tree: Acacia farnesiana.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Natural.
